step_rationale: ERK1/2 platelet signaling cascade; p38 cross-talk in platelet activation.
mechanism: ERK1 participates in platelet activation signaling and integrates with p38 pathways to amplify platelet recruitment and aggregation.

references.title: Common and specific proteins and pathways in heart and cerebral ischemia.
references.journal: Journal of stroke and cerebrovascular diseases : the official journal of National Stroke Association

references.title: Platelet-Specific p38α Deficiency Improved Cardiac Function After Myocardial Infarction in Mice.
